name: Western Wheat Pilaf
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Sesame seeds or pine nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion in margarine until soft.
2. Stir in wheat to coat with margarine.
3. Add low fat chicken bouillon cubes and water.
4. Measure orange juice and add enough sherry to make 1/2 cup.
5. Combine all ingredients in a large pot.
6. Cover and bring to a simmer over low heat.
7. Simmer for 35 minutes.
8. Five minutes before serving, stir in figs, sesame seeds or pine nuts, and orange peel.
9. Continue cooking covered until tender.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
Each serving contains about: Calories 248, Fat 6.97G, Sodium 378MG, Cholesterol 0.400MG, Protein 6.06G, Carbohydrates 40.1G, Fiber 9.43G.
